functions.description: Get Wwise version and basic project information.
Query Wwise objects. Supports 'from' (path, id, search, ofType), 'transform' (select, where) and return options.
Create a new Wwise object under a specified parent. Returns the created object's id, name, and path.
Delete a Wwise object by path or id. Check for dangling references before deletion.
Move a Wwise object to a new parent node. Preserves object properties and children.
Set a single property value on a Wwise object. Common properties: Volume, Pitch, LowPassFilter, HighPassFilter.
Set a reference-type property on a Wwise object (e.g., OutputBus, Target, Attenuation).
Batch set object properties, including complex operations like RTPC bindings, Effect slots, and nested object creation.
Get all available property and reference names for a given Wwise object.
Get the attenuation curve data for a specific object and curve type.
Set the attenuation curve for a specific object, defining distance-based volume or filter behavior.
Copy a Wwise object to a new parent location.
Get the list of all valid Wwise object types.
Get property definition details (type, range, default value) for a given property name.
Check if a specific property is enabled (overridden from parent) on an object.
Rename a Wwise object.
Set the Notes field on a Wwise object.
Create a transport instance for previewing (playing) an Event in the Wwise Authoring Tool.
Destroy (release) a previously created transport instance.
Execute a playback action (play, stop, pause, resume) on a transport instance.
Get all active transport instances in the current session.
Get the current state (playing, stopped, paused) of a transport instance.
Get the list of objects included in a SoundBank.
Set the objects included in a SoundBank.
Generate SoundBanks. In Auto-Defined SoundBank mode (default since Wwise 2022.1), manual generation is typically unnecessary.
Convert external audio sources for SoundBanks.
Import audio files (.wav, .ogg, etc.) into the Wwise project, creating Sound objects with AudioFileSource children.
Import audio files using a tab-delimited text file to define the import structure.
Connect to a remote game instance for profiling and real-time editing. BLACKLISTED in execute_waapi.
Disconnect from the remote game instance. BLACKLISTED in execute_waapi.
Get the list of available remote game consoles for connection.
Get the current remote connection status.
Begin an undo group to batch multiple operations. BLACKLISTED in execute_waapi.
Cancel an undo group, reverting all operations in the group.
End an undo group, committing all operations within it as a single undo step.
Undo the last operation or undo group.
Redo the last undone operation.
Start capturing profiler data from a connected game instance.
Stop capturing profiler data and return capture details.
Get the list of currently playing voices from the profiler.
Get bus metering data from the profiler (peak, RMS levels).
Get the current profiler cursor timestamp.
Save the current Wwise project. BLACKLISTED in execute_waapi (should be done by user in Wwise UI).
Open a Wwise project file. BLACKLISTED in execute_waapi.
Close the current Wwise project. BLACKLISTED in execute_waapi.
Assign a child object to a specific Switch/State in a Switch Container.
Remove a Switch/State assignment from a Switch Container child.
Get all Switch/State assignments for a Switch Container.
Get the currently selected objects in the Wwise Authoring UI.
Open a project in the Wwise UI. BLACKLISTED in execute_waapi.
Execute a Wwise UI command (menu action) by command ID.
Get the list of available Wwise UI commands.
Bring the Wwise Authoring Tool window to the foreground.
Get log messages from the Wwise log.
Paste properties from one object to another (equivalent to copy-paste in the UI).
Get the differences between two objects.
